reviews.comment:
Parecen carentes de personal siempre hay cola porque hay un solo playero y los surtidores son lentos.

(Translated by Google)
They seem understaffed; there's always a queue because there's only one attendant and the pumps are slow.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRMmNyVjR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Pocas ganas de atender, pedí información sobre mecanicos en la zona y si tenían algún convenio con descuento en la falda y ni los playeros y en el servicompras me pudieron asesorar... ni siquiera donde ir...  tengan en cuenta que estamos lejos de casa y no conocemos...  cuiden al turista !!!

(Translated by Google)
They weren't very helpful. I asked for information about mechanics in the area and if they had any discount agreements in La Falda, but neither the beach vendors nor the convenience store staff could advise me... they didn't even tell me where to go... Keep in mind that we're far from home and don't know the area... Take care of the tourists!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnNW91VlVBEAE

reviews.comment:
Ambiente súper agradable, bien distribuido los sectores para ver deportes y para comer. Excelente los sanitarios, muy limpios y amplios. El café aceptable. Gran variedad de postres entre los que destacan las porciones de torta".
Quiero destacar la atención, y por este motivo las 4 estrellas.  Sólo entramos por café y el personal que atiende el establecimiento por demás atentos.

(Translated by Google)
Super pleasant atmosphere, well laid out with areas for watching sports and eating. Excellent restrooms, very clean and spacious. The coffee is acceptable. Great variety of desserts, especially the cake slices.
I want to highlight the service, which is why I'm giving it 4 stars. We only went in for coffee, and the staff were incredibly attentive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURneWIzMWR3EAE
